name: Toggle

parameters.name: ChildContent
parameters.description: The toggle's content (label text and/or icon).

parameters.name: Pressed
parameters.description: Whether the toggle is pressed (on). Two-way bindable via PressedChanged.

parameters.name: PressedChanged
parameters.description: Raised when the toggle is clicked and its pressed state flips.

parameters.name: Size
parameters.description: Controls the toggle's height and horizontal padding. Default Md.

parameters.name: Density
parameters.description: Per-toggle density override. When null, inherits from any ancestor DensityScope; if neither is set, matches the historical Comfortable default. Only height + horizontal padding shift — text size + radius stay governed by Size.

parameters.name: Disabled
parameters.description: Disables the toggle, preventing clicks and dimming its appearance.

parameters.name: AriaLabel
parameters.description: Accessible name exposed via aria-label. Required when ChildContent is an icon only (no visible text) — otherwise screen readers announce the toggle as an unnamed button.

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the <button> element.

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes
parameters.description: Captures any unmatched attributes and applies them to the <button> element.

events.name: PressedChanged
events.description: Raised when the toggle is clicked and its pressed state flips.

examples.title: Variants
examples.code:
<Toggle @bind-Pressed="_pressed1">
    <SvgGlyph Svg="@(Lucide.Bold)" class="h-4 w-4" />
</Toggle>
<Toggle Variant="Toggle.ToggleVariant.Outline" @bind-Pressed="_pressed2">
    <SvgGlyph Svg="@(Lucide.Italic)" class="h-4 w-4" />
</Toggle>

examples.title: Sizes
examples.code:
<Toggle Size="Lumeo.Size.Sm" @bind-Pressed="_sm">
    <SvgGlyph Svg="@(Lucide.Bold)" class="h-3 w-3" />
</Toggle>
<Toggle @bind-Pressed="_md">
    <SvgGlyph Svg="@(Lucide.Bold)" class="h-4 w-4" />
</Toggle>
<Toggle Size="Lumeo.Size.Lg" @bind-Pressed="_lg">
    <SvgGlyph Svg="@(Lucide.Bold)" class="h-5 w-5" />
</Toggle>

slots.name: ChildContent
slots.description: The toggle's content (label text and/or icon).

mdSummary:
# Toggle

Two-state button with pressed/unpressed styling.

**Package:** `Lumeo` · **Category:** Forms/Buttons & Actions
**Docs:** https://lumeo.nativ.sh/components/toggle

## Parameters
| Owner | Name | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| Toggle | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` | The toggle's content (label text and/or icon). |
| Toggle | Pressed | `bool` | `false` | Whether the toggle is pressed (on). Two-way bindable via PressedChanged. |
| Toggle | PressedChanged | `EventCallback<bool>` | `` | Raised when the toggle is clicked and its pressed state flips. |
| Toggle | Variant | `ToggleVariant` | `ToggleVariant.Default` | Visual style: Default (borderless) or Outline (bordered). |
| Toggle | Size | `Lumeo.Size` | `Lumeo.Size.Md` | Controls the toggle's height and horizontal padding. Default Md. |
| Toggle | Density | `Density?` | `` | Per-toggle density override. When null, inherits from any ancestor DensityScope; if neither is set, matches the historical Comfortable default. Only height + horizontal padding shift — text size + radius stay governed by Size. |
| Toggle | InheritedDensity | `Density?` | `` |  |
| Toggle | Disabled | `bool` | `false` | Disables the toggle, preventing clicks and dimming its appearance. |
| Toggle | AriaLabel | `string?` | `` | Accessible name exposed via aria-label. Required when ChildContent is an icon only (no visible text) — otherwise screen readers announce the toggle as an unnamed button. |
| Toggle | Class | `string?` | `` | Additional CSS classes merged onto the \<button\> element. |
| Toggle | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` | Captures any unmatched attributes and applies them to the \<button\> element. |

## Slots
- `ChildContent` (Toggle) — The toggle's content (label text and/or icon).

## Events
- `PressedChanged` (`EventCallback<bool>`) — Raised when the toggle is clicked and its pressed state flips.

## Sub-components
- (none)

## Cascading values it expects
- `InheritedDensity` (`Density?`)

## Services it injects
- (none)

## Keyboard
—

## Example
```razor
<Toggle />
```

## CSS variables
`--color-accent`, `--color-accent-foreground`, `--color-input`, `--color-muted`, `--color-muted-foreground`, `--color-ring`, `--radius`

## Files
- `UI/Toggle/Toggle.razor`
